category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for Brazil market entry (ANATEL / INMETRO / ABNT).

title.en: China-to-Brazil Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ANATEL / INMETRO / ABNT)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入巴西：合规差距矩阵（ANATEL / INMETRO / ABNT）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入巴西：合規差距矩陣（ANATEL / INMETRO / ABNT）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Brazilian ANATEL mandatory homologation (RF device type approval under Resolution 242/2000 and updates), INMETRO compulsory safety certification for power adapters and electrical products, ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR 32 EMC standards, ANATEL label and in-country procurador requirements for foreign manufacturers, and LGPD data-privacy obligations for connected and IoT devices. Brazil has no mutual recognition with FCC, CE, or CCC.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与巴西ANATEL强制型式认可（依据第242/2000号决议及更新版本的射频设备型号认证）、电源适配器和电气产品的INMETRO强制安全认证、ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR 32 EMC标准、外国制造商的ANATEL标签及境内授权代理人（procurador）要求，以及联网和物联网设备LGPD数据隐私义务的差距对照。巴西与FCC、CE或CCC均无相互认可协议。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與巴西ANATEL強制型式認可（依據第242/2000號決議及更新版本的射頻裝置型號認證）、電源適配器和電氣產品的INMETRO強制安全認證、ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR 32 EMC標準、外國製造商的ANATEL標籤及境內授權代理人（procurador）要求，以及聯網和物聯網裝置LGPD數據隱私義務的差距對照。巴西與FCC、CE或CCC均無相互認可協議。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, ANATEL homologation, INMETRO certification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current ANATEL resolutions, INMETRO compulsory certification scope, ABNT NBR standards, LGPD obligations, and Brazil import and labelling requirements with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or sale in Brazil.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、ANATEL型式认可、INMETRO认证、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在向巴西发货或销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行ANATEL决议、INMETRO强制认证范围、ABNT NBR标准、LGPD义务及巴西进口和标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、ANATEL型式認可、INMETRO認證、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在向巴西發貨或銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行ANATEL決議、INMETRO強制認證範圍、ABNT NBR標準、LGPD義務及巴西進口和標籤要求。

answer_first.en: The main Brazil compliance gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: ANATEL mandatory homologation — all RF-emitting devices require an ANATEL certificate and ANATEL ID label before import or sale, with no recognition of FCC, CE, SRRC, or CCC approvals; a Brazil-registered procurador (in-country representative) required for foreign manufacturers; INMETRO compulsory certification for power adapters and chargers; ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR EMC compliance; and LGPD data-privacy design requirements for connected devices. Devices imported without ANATEL homologation are subject to customs seizure.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入巴西的主要合规差距为：ANATEL强制型式认可——所有射频发射设备在进口或销售前须取得ANATEL证书及ANATEL ID标签，不认可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；外国制造商须在巴西注册境内授权代理人（procurador）；电源适配器和充电器须取得INMETRO强制认证；ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR EMC合规；以及联网设备的LGPD数据隐私设计要求。未取得ANATEL型式认可进口的设备将面临海关扣押。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入巴西的主要合規差距為：ANATEL強制型式認可——所有射頻發射裝置在進口或銷售前須取得ANATEL證書及ANATEL ID標籤，不認可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；外國製造商須在巴西註冊境內授權代理人（procurador）；電源適配器和充電器須取得INMETRO強制認證；ABNT NBR 55032 / CISPR EMC合規；以及聯網裝置的LGPD數據隱私設計要求。未取得ANATEL型式認可進口的裝置將面臨海關扣押。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
